behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels for attendee attribution.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: System (real API call). PASS2-AUDIT: correctness here is not transport/integration; it is whether the speech model preserves/assigns speaker labels from real audio. A stubbed transcript would hide diarization failures, so this is LLM/ML-output dependent. FINAL: Agentic. Rejected Workflow because behavior text targets a single model outcome: "speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels" (not a multi-agentic chain assertion).
behaviors.test_description: Run real multi-speaker meeting audio through the production STT model/API and assert transcript chunks retain speaker labels consistently enough for downstream attendee attribution (e.g., labeled turns per known speakers).

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Unit. PASS2-AUDIT: behavior text is parser logic: "parsing extracts explicit task assignments ... into structure." This can fail within one function/object using fixed transcript text; no OS/network/subprocess required, no real model judgment required. FINAL: Unit. Rejected Integration because no behavior text indicates cross-module handoff is required to trigger the failure.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser fixtures with explicit assignment utterances and verify structured outputs contain correct assignee and task text pairs, including edge phrasing and multiple assignments in one turn.

behaviors.description: Live summary includes at least one action item for every attendee assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Agentic. PASS2-AUDIT: this is output-quality/coverage of generated summary content, i.e., whether the model includes required action items per attendee. Deterministic stubs can always satisfy coverage and hide real omission failures. FINAL: Agentic. Rejected Workflow because this behavior can be validated with a fixed transcript input and one real summarization model decision boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Provide real meeting transcript(s) with known attendee-task assignments to the production summarizer and assert output action_items cover every assigned attendee at least once.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` schema section, not generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Unit. PASS2-AUDIT: behavior text emphasizes routing logic after decisions are already identified: "routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema." This is deterministic mapping/placement logic, testable at one local boundary. FINAL: Unit. Rejected Agentic because the text explicitly scopes to routing identified items, not model judgment of what is a decision.
behaviors.test_description: Given pre-identified decision objects and narrative content, verify mapper/formatter places decisions only under `decisions` and does not duplicate or bury them in narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions in transcript appear in live summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Agentic. PASS2-AUDIT: this checks model extraction quality and placement in generated output from transcript content. Mocking model output would hide misses where real model mentions decisions only narratively or omits them. FINAL: Agentic. Rejected Workflow because behavior can be tested at single summarization output boundary from a transcript input.
behaviors.test_description: Run real transcript inputs containing explicit decisions through the production summarizer and assert those decisions are present in the `decisions` section (not only narrative text).

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Workflow. PASS2-AUDIT: behavior explicitly requires sequential multi-step processing across segments and merged summary coherence. This chains multiple model-influenced steps (segment transcribe/summarize + merge), so single-step Agentic is insufficient. FINAL: Workflow. Rejected lower levels because behavior text requires "splits into segments ... sequentially, merging ... coherent summary," i.e., cross-step agentic handoff correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real >60-minute meeting recording; execute production segmentation pipeline end-to-end; assert all segments are processed in order, merged output is structurally valid, and cross-segment action items/decisions remain coherent/non-contradictory.

behaviors.description: Full pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) runs automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Workflow. PASS2-AUDIT: this is explicit end-to-end orchestration over real recording with multiple AI/ML stages (STT then summarization) and delivery. Failures can occur at stage handoffs and cumulative model behavior; lower isolated levels miss them. FINAL: Workflow. Rejected System because behavior text requires full multi-stage pipeline success "without manual intervention," not only real infra behavior of one stage.
behaviors.test_description: Execute production pipeline on a real meeting file from ingestion to delivered structured payload, asserting automatic completion, required schema presence, and non-empty action items/decisions/attributions with no manual recovery steps.
